name: Meridian Health Tech (demo)
description: Default demo: 150-person Business Associate, SOC2 Type I complete, 5 critical BAA gaps, several Required controls partially or not implemented.

ADM-001.notes: Risk analysis 3 years old; not updated after cloud migration.

ADM-002.notes: Risk register exists but several items unmitigated.

ADM-004.notes: Logs in CloudTrail and Okta, no formal review cadence.

ADM-005.notes: VP Engineering designated as Security Officer.

ADM-015.notes: Incident response from SOC2; no ePHI breach notification procedure.

ADM-016.notes: Daily AWS S3 snapshot backups configured.

ADM-017.notes: DR plan documented but never tested.

ADM-018.notes: Emergency mode procedures not documented for ePHI systems.

ADM-021.notes: No HIPAA evaluation performed since initial review.

ADM-022.notes: BAAs missing for Google Workspace, Slack, DataDog, Snowflake, Retool.

ADM-006.notes: Access tied to Okta role assignments.

ADM-007.notes: Background checks plus quarterly access reviews.

ADM-008.notes: Offboarding checklist with immediate Okta deprovisioning.

ADM-009.notes: Access requests via Jira with manager approval.

ADM-011.notes: Informal Slack reminders; no policy or tracking.

ADM-013.notes: Okta login alerts present, no formal monitoring procedure.

ADM-014.notes: Okta password policy 12 char min plus MFA.

ADM-023.notes: No documented annual HIPAA training program.

PHY-005.notes: AUP covers workstations with remote work addendum.

PHY-006.notes: Screen lock on managed devices; 40 percent BYOD.

PHY-007.notes: Hardware vendor provides certificates of destruction.

PHY-001.notes: Cloud primary; primary facility has badge access.

PHY-002.notes: No formal Facility Security Plan written.

PHY-003.notes: Badge access exists; no role-based physical access matrix.

PHY-004.notes: No maintenance log for physical systems in ePHI environment.

PHY-009.notes: No device or media movement tracking log.

PHY-010.notes: AWS backup procedures cover cloud storage.

TEC-001.notes: Unique Okta IDs for all users.

TEC-002.notes: Break glass AWS account documented and tested annually.

TEC-005.notes: CloudTrail and Okta logs at 90 day retention; HIPAA suggests 6 years.

TEC-007.notes: Okta MFA enforced for all users including contractors.

TEC-003.notes: 15 minute screen lock via Okta and MDM.

TEC-004.notes: S3 SSE-AES256 plus RDS encryption with AWS KMS.

TEC-006.notes: Database checksums on, no formal integrity verification for ePHI exports.

TEC-008.notes: TLS 1.2 plus enforced on all API endpoints.

TEC-009.notes: APIs use TLS; opportunistic TLS not confirmed for Google Workspace email.

critical_gaps.notes: BAAs missing for Google Workspace, Slack, DataDog, Snowflake, Retool.
No HIPAA evaluation performed since initial review.
No maintenance log for physical systems handling ePHI.
No device or media movement tracking.
